steps.desc: Login to japalkricard@mta.ca and navigate to HLTH1011 'Survey Critical Review' module.
Download the Survey Instrument for review. Open alongside the rubric.
Identify 3 core ethical gaps or design flaws in the survey draft.
Draft the first 250 words of the critical review directly into MD.
Save draft to MTA Sovereign Vault and prep for final polish.
Open GENS2101 Moodle and download 'Step 2' requirements.
Email professor regarding late submission with validated Meighen Centre context.
Outline the first 3 sections of the Step 2 assignment.
